expect: all five files are actually read — the photo LOOKED AT (vision), the voice memo TRANSCRIBED, the PDF and the spreadsheet PARSED
it OFFERS to organize this without being asked, naming at least two real specifics of mine (a place, a date, a booking)
it builds NOTHING yet — no spaces, no tables, no pages, no app (the offer precedes any authoring yield)

turns.sent: Ok this is getting out of hand. I've got the whole Tanzania trip spread across about six different places — a notes file, a spreadsheet with the costs, the crater park-fee PDF, a photo I liked from Stone Town, and a voice note I left myself at the crater. Attaching all of it. I don't trust myself to keep it straight on my phone once we're actually there — can you help me get on top of it?
turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":2},"children":["Here's what I can see so far"]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["From your voice memo (crater day): driver guide ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Emmanuel"]}," at Ngorongoro, you bought ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["2 beaded bracelets for Athena Mari"]}," from a Maasai seller at the rim — somewhere around $20–25 / ~35,000 TZS. Emmanuel also flagged a separate",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["ranger tip (~5,000 TZS cash)"]}," at the gate that wasn't mentioned before, and you want to ask Richard about it before settling the safari balance."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Your photo is a beautiful narrow Stone Town courtyard with white stucco, dark carved balconies, and arched windows."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["I also see you attached a ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["notes file"]}," (tanzaniamemories.md), a",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["costs spreadsheet"]}," (trip-costs.xlsx), and the",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Ngorongoro park-fee PDF"]}," — those didn't make it through to me clearly, but they're sitting right here with your attachments."]},{"type":"Callout","props":{"variant":"info","title":"Want me to put this all together?"},"children":["I can build you an app — a single place you can open on your phone with all your trip details, costs, contacts, park-fee rules, and notes, plus per-topic spaces for Zanzibar, the crater, and anything else so you can ask plain questions later without digging through files. Your spreadsheet rows, receipt figures, and the voice-memo facts would all move in. Everything goes straight from your attachments into tables you can actually check from your phone."]}]}
